base.$description: Base stacking level (0) — default in-flow content. DRAFT pending design review.

dropdown.$description: Dropdown menus and select popups. DRAFT pending design review.

sticky.$description: Sticky elements that pin on scroll (headers, toolbars). DRAFT pending design review.

overlay.$description: Full-screen overlay scrims sitting behind modal content. DRAFT pending design review.

modal.$description: Modal dialogs and side sheets. DRAFT pending design review.

popover.$description: Popovers anchored to a trigger, above modals. DRAFT pending design review.

toast.$description: Toast and snackbar notifications. DRAFT pending design review.

tooltip.$description: Tooltips — the top-most interactive layer. DRAFT pending design review.
